summary: There was a statistically anomalous spike in adverse event reports for ibuprofen on 2023-11-21, with 344 reports exceeding the expected count of 56.22.
notable_pattern: Reports from this time window frequently involved co-administered opioids and other medications, with a focus on dependence and overdose.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should not be considered a clinical conclusion.
